{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The output walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs by reordering for logical progression and removing redundancy.",
    "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, tightening phrasing and fixing flow.",
    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the need to model battery degradation and heterogeneous fleets.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) by addressing all aspects of the original content without drift.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; the output identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as the limitations of simulated fleet dynamics and the need for further tuning.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, maintaining traceability throughout the edits."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The output walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency, and proposes minimal repairs by reordering for logical progression and removing redundancy.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning, tightening phrasing and fixing flow.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the need to model battery degradation and heterogeneous fleets.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) by addressing all aspects of the original content without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; the output identifies harmful patterns in the original, such as the limitations of simulated fleet dynamics and the need for further tuning.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, maintaining traceability throughout the edits.
